'''Ring Lake''',<ref name="DFR">''[[Dark Force Rising]]''</ref> also referred to as '''Rim Lake''',<ref name="DFRSB">''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]''</ref> was a [[lake]] on [[Jomark/Legends|Jomark]]. [[High Castle]] was located on an island formed by an extinct cinder cone in the middle of the Ring Lake. It was formed by [[Water/Legends|water]] filling a collapsed caldera of a volcano.<ref name="DFR" />
{{Loc-stub}}
